purposeParagraphs: This document defines the software requirements for the Demo SRS Project.
scopeParagraphs: The system covers onboarding, approvals, and compliance reporting workflows.
overviewParagraphs: Section 2 describes the product context and users.
productPerspective: The product integrates with identity, notifications, and reporting services.
productFunctionsBullets: Authenticate users and enforce role-based access

userClasses.description: Configures system settings and user access

constraintsNumbered: The solution shall use existing enterprise SSO.
The first release shall be delivered within 8 weeks.
assumptionsNumbered: API access credentials are provided by client during sprint 1.
userInterfacesParagraphs: The user interface is web-based and optimized for modern desktop browsers.
hardwareInterfacesParagraphs: No dedicated hardware interfaces are required for this release.
softwareInterfacesParagraphs: The system interfaces with SSO and notification services using REST APIs.

requirements.title: User authentication
requirements.description: The system shall authenticate users using enterprise SSO.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a valid enterprise user, when they sign in, then authentication succeeds.
Given invalid credentials, when sign-in is attempted, then access is denied.

requirements.title: Response time
requirements.description: The system shall return API responses within 2 seconds at p95 under normal load.
acceptanceCriteria: Given normal load, when API endpoints are called, then p95 latency is <= 2 seconds.

designConstraintsParagraphs: The application stack must remain compatible with current infrastructure policy.
logicalDatabaseParagraphs: User, request, and audit entities shall be retained with strict referential integrity.
reliabilityParagraphs: The system shall recover from transient errors without data loss.
availabilityParagraphs: The service shall target 99.9% monthly uptime.
securityParagraphs: All sensitive data shall be encrypted at rest and in transit.
maintainabilityParagraphs: The codebase shall enforce linting and test checks in CI.
portabilityParagraphs: The service shall run in containerized environments.
otherRequirementsParagraphs: Any future AI module requirements are explicitly out of scope for this release.
dataModelsParagraphs: Appendix includes high-level logical entity descriptions.
complianceConsiderationsParagraphs: Applicable controls from ISO-27001 are captured for implementation planning.
